source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 向着建成科技强国的目标坚定迈进
topics.official_english: China Steadfastly Advances Toward Becoming a Science and Technology Powerhouse
topics.why_hot: Official statement on national science and technology strategy, reflecting China's ambition to lead in innovation.
topics.share_angle: Explain China's roadmap to becoming a tech superpower and its global implications.

topics.chinese_topic: 台风巴威可能正面登陆
topics.official_english: Typhoon Bavi May Make Direct Landfall
topics.why_hot: Public safety concern as a strong typhoon approaches, prompting widespread attention and preparedness.
topics.share_angle: Discuss typhoon preparedness and the science behind tracking storms.

topics.chinese_topic: 新华社：国足成绩再不好 也不能造谣
topics.official_english: Xinhua: No Excuse for Rumors Even if National Football Team Performs Poorly
topics.why_hot: Official media condemns misinformation about the national football team, highlighting media ethics.
topics.share_angle: Explore the balance between criticism and rumor in sports journalism.

topics.chinese_topic: 台风来临 请备好这份避险指南
topics.official_english: Typhoon Approaching: Prepare This Safety Guide
topics.why_hot: Practical safety information during typhoon season, widely shared for public awareness.
topics.share_angle: Provide actionable tips for typhoon safety and explain why preparation matters.

topics.chinese_topic: 雷军正式公布小米汽车新系列
topics.official_english: Lei Jun Officially Unveils New Xiaomi EV Series
topics.why_hot: Major tech company entering the EV market, generating buzz about product specs and competition.
topics.share_angle: Analyze Xiaomi's strategy in the EV market and its potential impact on the industry.

topics.chinese_topic: 村民在养猪场旁挖出1400年前佛首
topics.official_english: Villagers Unearth 1,400-Year-Old Buddha Head Near Pig Farm
topics.why_hot: Archaeological discovery blending everyday life with ancient history, sparking curiosity.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the significance of the find and how such discoveries are handled.

topics.chinese_topic: 中方代表：反对一切冲突中的性暴力
topics.official_english: Chinese Representative: Oppose All Forms of Sexual Violence in Conflict
topics.why_hot: China's stance on a global human rights issue, relevant to international diplomacy.
topics.share_angle: Explain China's position on conflict-related sexual violence and its diplomatic context.

topics.chinese_topic: 养“光伏羊”每年收入近10万元
topics.official_english: Raising 'Solar Sheep' Yields Nearly 100,000 Yuan Annual Income
topics.why_hot: Innovative combination of solar energy and agriculture boosting rural incomes, inspiring sustainable practices.
topics.share_angle: Showcase how agrivoltaics is transforming livelihoods in rural China.
